channel.title: mysql on 戈壁堂

item.title: Mysql
item.description: SQL Joins What’s the difference between INNER JOIN, LEFT JOIN, RIGHT JOIN and FULL JOIN? An SQL JOIN clause is used to combine rows from two or more tables, based on a common field between them. There are different types of joins available in SQL: INNER JOIN: returns rows when there is a match in both tables. LEFT JOIN: returns all rows from the left table, even if there are
